Thank you for your interest in instituting good governance practice in Meralco
If you are aware of any violation of the following corporate governance rules, committed by any our directors, officers or employees, related to the following:
Violation of the Corporate Governance Rules
Violation of the Code of Ethics and Company Code of Employee Discipline or other similar codes
Financial Malfeasance including those relating to financial fraud and questionable accounting and auditing matters
Kindly fill out the appropriate forms (click to download) and submit to any of the CG communication channels
Meralco values your privacy.
We collect your name, address, employee number, job title/position, company/office, contact number, email address, and signature solely to facilitate action on the Violation of Corporate Governance Rules and/or Retaliation Protection report you have submitted. These are accessed by Corporate Governance Office who hold such information under strict confidentiality. These are retained while any of the involved parties is employed in Meralco and shall be disposed of accordingly thereafter.
To know more about how we protect your data, visit
Privacy
. To exercise your data subject rights, contact
cdpo@meralco.com.ph
eReport Mo Form
Anti-Retaliation Form
Maintenance Schedule
July 26, 2026 - Cavite (Naic)
Cavite
BETWEEN 3:00AM AND 8:00AM – PORTIONS OF CIRCUITS TMC II 46WA, 425WA AND 43WA
Portion of Juanito Remulla Sr. Road (Governor's Drive), P. Poblete, Mabini and Lopez Jaena Sts., and Naic – Ternate Road from near Lucky-118 Hardware & Construction Supplies Store to and including Kalye Cena St.; Diosomito Subd., J. P. Lopez Subd., Precious Ville Subd., Sitio Pulong Ipot, Querubin Subd., BLISS Subd., Ciudad Nuevo Subd. Phase 3A, Kalipayan Homes, Phil. Retirement Paradise Subd., Saddle & Clubs Leisure Park Subd. Phase 1, Sterling Residences One Subd. Phases 1 & 2, Lopez Subd. and Verdant Residences Subd.; Public Market, Tibagan, NIA, Evangelista, Masagana and Capt. Hinahon Sts. in Bgys. Sabang, Ibayong Silangan, Labac, Makina, San Roque and Sapa; including Bgys. Gomez-Zamora, Nazareno, Kanluran, Humbac, Santulan, Balsahan, Ibayo Estacion, Bucana Sasahan, Latoria, Bucana Malaki, Bagong Kalsada, Bancaan and Mabolo.
Portion of Juanito Remulla Sr. Road (Governor's Drive) and Antero Soriano Highway from Naic Diversion Bridge to PTT Gas Station including Villa Apolonia Subd. Phases 1 & 2, St. Julianne Homes, Coastal Homes, Junto Del Mar Village, Morante Subd., Sitio Gulod, Sitio Pobres Kanluran and Sitio Pobres Silangan; and Tramo St. in Bgys. Ibayong Silangan, Munting Mapino and Timalan Concepcion.
REASON:
Relocation of pole affected by LGU road widening along Antero Soriano Highway in Bgy. Ibayong Silangan, Naic, Cavite.
